Class ContextProviderNode

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.AbstractContextNode<ContextProvider>
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.ContextProviderNode
public class ContextProviderNode extends AbstractContextNode<ContextProvider>
A context tree node representing a ContextProvider.

This node handles the recursive structure of context providers. It has special logic for the ToolManager, which exposes its registered toolkits as child nodes.

Author:
anahata

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      Checks if the underlying domain object is currently active in the context.

      Subclasses override this method to define their specific active-state policy, allowing for clean, polymorphic evaluation without dirty instanceof chains.

      Specified by:
      isActive in class AbstractContextNode<ContextProvider>
      Returns:
      true if active, false otherwise.

    • updateStatus

      protected void updateStatus()
      Updates the status string for this node.
      Specified by:
      updateStatus in class AbstractContextNode<ContextProvider>
